details: The agent successfully completed both steps. It navigated to https://httpbin.org/status/404, correctly identified the HTTP ERROR 404 and Chrome's error page, then navigated to https://httpbin.org/html and correctly reported the page content as a Herman Melville Moby-Dick excerpt with the heading 'Herman Melville - Moby-Dick'. Both steps were completed accurately with actual browser navigation verified by the trajectory.
